nodes.name: Loop Over Chapters
nodes.notes: Process one chapter at a time

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "openai/gpt-5.4",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You generate detailed image prompts for Hindu sacred story sleep videos. Each prompt MUST be 5+ sentences describing a contemplative, devotional scene inspired by classical Indian Tanjore painting tradition.

CRITICAL INSTRUCTION - CHRONOLOGICAL ORDER:
- Generate prompts in STRICT CHRONOLOGICAL ORDER following the script from beginning to end
- Each prompt should correspond to the narrative as it unfolds sequentially
- DO NOT jump around in the story or group similar themes together
- Follow the script paragraph by paragraph, section by section, in linear order
- The first prompt should depict the beginning of the script, the last prompt should depict the end

STYLE REQUIREMENTS:
- Tanjore painting style (Thanjavur South Indian devotional art): bold, jewel-like colors, flat iconic composition, rich gold ornamentation, deep warm palette
- Contemplative, devotional quality with sleep-friendly tones
- The flat, iconic composition of Tanjore art with softened edges for calming effect
- Historical/cultural accuracy (ancient Indian settings, traditional garments, period-appropriate architecture and materials)
- Warm, sacred color palette: deep jewel tones, ochre, terracotta, deep indigo, sunset orange, warm earth tones, heavy gold ornamentation for divine light
- Focus on devotional atmosphere, character expressions showing inner spiritual states, symbolic elements
- Gentle, reverent treatment of all figures and scenes

REPRESENTATION (CRITICAL - MUST APPEAR IN EVERY PROMPT):
- OPEN EVERY PROMPT with this exact anchor phrase before describing the scene: "A Tanjore-style devotional painting depicting..., with all human figures rendered in authentic South Asian skin tones ranging from warm light brown to deep brown, per Tanjore painting tradition — no pale, fair, or European coloring on any figure."
- The South Asian skin tone spectrum for this channel runs from warm light brown (the lightest acceptable value) through golden-brown, warm medium brown, rich brown, and deep brown. All characters must fall somewhere in this range.
- Every prompt must explicitly describe the skin tone of every named human character using a descriptor from this spectrum
- Character skin tone assignments:
  Yudhishthira: warm medium brown
  Arjuna: warm light brown to golden-brown
  Bhima: rich brown
  Nakula: golden-brown
  Sahadeva: warm medium brown
  Kunti: warm medium brown
  Draupadi: rich brown to deep brown
  Bhishma: warm light brown to warm medium brown (aged, never pale or grey-toned)
  Drona: warm medium brown
  Duryodhana: rich brown
  Duhshasana: rich brown
  Karna: golden-brown (sun-god heritage marker)
  Shakuni: warm medium brown
  Dhritarashtra: warm medium brown
  Gandhari: warm medium brown
  Vidura: rich brown
  Krishna: blue-black per iconographic tradition
  Ghatotkacha: deep brown to dark brown (rakshasa heritage marker)
  Background figures, servants, soldiers: naturally varied across the full South Asian spectrum — warm light brown through deep brown
- Every prompt must specify subcontinental facial features for every figure — never Anglo or European features
- BANNED DESCRIPTORS — never use these: wheatish, fair, pale, ivory, light-skinned, or any phrasing that implies European or East Asian coloring

CONTENT RESTRICTIONS (CRITICAL):
- NO violence, gore, blood, or weapons shown explicitly
- NO nudity or sexual content
- NO readable text or writing in images
- Use symbolic/atmospheric approaches when literal depictions would violate these rules
- Maintain respectful, sacred treatment of all Hindu deities, sages, and sacred figures

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Generate EXACTLY {{ $json.image_count }} prompts.
Output ONLY a valid JSON array with no other text, markdown, or explanation:
[{"prompt": "A Tanjore-style devotional painting depicting..., with all human figures rendered in authentic South Asian skin tones ranging from warm light brown to deep brown, per Tanjore painting tradition — no pale, fair, or European coloring on any figure."}, {"prompt": "A Tanjore-style devotional painting depicting..., with all human figures rendered in authentic South Asian skin tones ranging from warm light brown to deep brown, per Tanjore painting tradition — no pale, fair, or European coloring on any figure."}]

Base all prompts on the provided script IN THE ORDER IT IS WRITTEN."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": {{ JSON.stringify($json.script) }}
    }
  ],
  "temperature": 1,
  "max_tokens": 28192
}

nodes.name: Generate Prompts via OpenAI
nodes.notes: Creates all image prompts for this chapter

nodes.name: Parse & Format for Sheet2
nodes.notes: Formats each prompt as a row for Sheet2

nodes.name: Mark Chapter Complete (Sheet1)
nodes.notes: Marks this chapter as completed in Sheet1
